summary: AURA AI Chat rename and alignment testing complete. All features working as expected. AURA branding fully implemented (renamed from LEXA AI), female avatar image displayed, buttons properly aligned vertically in bottom-right corner on both desktop and mobile.

aura_branding.chat_button_avatar: PASS - AURA button displays female avatar image (aura-avatar.png)
aura_branding.input_placeholder: PASS - 'Ask AURA about smart home solutions...'

button_alignment.desktop_vertical_stacking: PASS - AURA above WhatsApp (AURA bottom: 977px, WA top: 992px)
button_alignment.desktop_right_alignment: PASS - Right edges aligned within 1px (AURA: 1897px, WA: 1896px)
button_alignment.mobile_visible: PASS - Both buttons visible on 390x844 viewport
button_alignment.mobile_in_viewport: PASS - Both buttons within viewport bounds

ai_chat_functionality.widget_opens: PASS - Chat widget opens on button click
ai_chat_functionality.ai_response: PASS - AURA responds with smart home recommendations
ai_chat_functionality.lead_scoring: PASS - Lead score calculated based on qualifying info

verified_elements.chat_pulse_animation: Present in globals.css with gold color #C9A962

critical_code_review_comments: AURA branding correctly implemented throughout AIChatWidget.tsx
System prompt (AURA_SYSTEM_PROMPT) is comprehensive with full LEXA solutions catalog, pricing tiers, and brand partners
Button positioning uses Tailwind classes: bottom-[104px] for AURA, bottom-6 for WhatsApp - properly stacked
AI responses include relevant LEXA solutions and page recommendations
seed_data_creation: Created test chat sessions with test_* prefixed session_ids
context_for_next_testing_agent: AURA AI Chat testing complete. All AURA branding elements verified: header name 'AURA', subtitle 'Smart Home Consultant', welcome 'Hi, I'm AURA', input placeholder 'Ask AURA about smart home solutions...', footer 'Powered by AURA'. Avatar image displays correctly. Buttons aligned vertically (AURA above WhatsApp) with same right-edge alignment. Backend uses emergentintegrations LlmChat with gpt-4o-mini. 8 pytest tests created in test_aura_chatbot.py.
